{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Arelius bloodline power
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] can detect the hair-thin strands of [[madra]] from [[Eithan]]'s [[Arelius bloodline power]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
